description: Deterministic validation rules for Phase 1 output validation and Phase 3 grounding verification.

evidence_consistency_rules.description: Score > 0 must have evidence beyond default string
evidence_consistency_rules.check: if count > 0 then evidence.length > 20 AND evidence !== 'Document silent on this topic.'
if count === 0 then evidence contains 'silent' OR 'absent' OR 'not found' OR 'no evidence' OR 'missing'
reasoning contains 'Crit 1' OR 'Sub-criteria' OR numbered evaluation pattern

evidence_consistency_rules.description: Score must be mathematically consistent with sub-criteria count in reasoning
evidence_consistency_rules.check: count of 'Found' or 'Met' in reasoning should approximate score value

completeness_rules.description: All 25 criteria per stream must be present
No duplicate criteria IDs within a stream
All scores must be integers in [0,3]

claim_verification_rules.description: Every tactic_id referenced must exist in the tactics database
claim_verification_rules.check: extract all TAC-XXX-NNN patterns, verify each exists in tactics DB

claim_verification_rules.description: No weasel words in strategic recommendations
claim_verification_rules.check: scan remediation actions for weasel word patterns

claim_verification_rules.description: Executive summary scores must match Phase 2 metrics
claim_verification_rules.check: extract any percentage or score claims from summary, verify against Phase 2 validation data

claim_verification_rules.description: Remediation roadmap must address top blockers from Phase 2
claim_verification_rules.check: Phase 2 key_blockers should have corresponding remediation actions

tactic_mapping_rules.description: Each maturity gap should map to at least one tactic
Tactics must come from the verified database, not invented

termination_policy.graceful_degradation_behavior: Emit partial report with confidence warning. Phase 3 marked as incomplete with explanation. Phase 1 and Phase 2 results still delivered.
termination_policy.repair_transparency: If repair was needed, include a 'validation_notes' field in the output explaining what was repaired.
